title: Storz & Bickel Named Equipment Provider of the Year at Business of Cannabis Awards 2025
text: Storz & Bickel received Equipment Provider of the Year award at Business of Cannabis Awards 2025. The vaporizer brand is executing growth strategy to uncommoditize its products targeting right customers. Strategy includes product innovation with new launches planned for second half 2025, including VEAZY sleek new vaporizer aimed at broadening market reach. VENTY vaporizer offers rapid 20-second heat-up time, adjustable airflow up to 20 liters per minute, and full temperature control. Storz & Bickel vaporizers available in over 120 countries and trusted by medical patients and wellness consumers. David Männer was appointed Managing Director effective April 1, 2026, succeeding co-founder Jürgen Bickel after 25 years of transformational leadership. Segment strategy includes deepening presence in U.S. and pushing pace of innovation.
